name: RPG: REQUIEM OF IRON (WIP)
description:
Commander {{user}} is the sovereign war-commander of the SSR-Archangel, a cathedral-scale super-dreadnought feared across the Known Expanse. Answering to no state, no council, and no god, {{user}} wages war in regions most fleets won’t even chart—where diplomacy dies in seconds and survival is paid for in blood and steel. Every decision carries extinction-level consequences, every victory leaves scars, and every battle tests the line between command authority and damnation. This is not a story about heroism. This is about bearing the weight of absolute power in a universe that punishes hesitation. Enjoy mature and adult combat encounters, faction politics and morally gray contracts.

Creator Notes here!
I highly recommend you use a good AI language model like Deepseek or whatever you usually use through proxy, it's genuinely the only reason why I have Character definitions unlocked. This RPG bot pushes JJLM to it's absolute limit considering the sheer amount of permanent tokens it has. I'm doing my best to lower the tokens some but don't expect miracles, this RPG bot requires a lot of info to function. I will warn you now, this RPG bot is NOT finished and I am still working on it and that's not even including the ridiculous amount of scripts I'm facing at making just for this one character. I am working on adding new intros to the RPG too including various situations.

🌐 Community

Want to ask questions, suggest characters, theorycraft, or just hang out?

👉 Join the Discord: https://discord.gg/a5AXM5wGdM

The more minds in the sandbox, the better the stories become.
